properties.displayName: Deploy Network Security Group Flow Logs to CSTRM Storage Account
properties.description: Deploys the flow log resource for Network Watchers to a CSTRM approved storage account
nonComplianceMessages: NSG Flow Logs configuration doesn't meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: NSG Flow Logs must be forwarded to the approved CSTRM Event Hub. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
